ddls:
CREATE TABLE "requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the request (e.g., Open, Closed) */,
  "police_zone" INTEGER /* ID of the police zone where the request was made */,
  "council_district" INTEGER /* ID of the council district where the request was made */,
  "neighborhood" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood where the request was made */,
  "geo_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the geographical information (e.g., Exact, Approximate) */,
  "request_origin" TEXT /* Source of the request (e.g., Control Panel, Website) */,
  "tract" TEXT /* Census tract where the request was made */,
  "x_full_text" TEXT /* Full text of the request geolocation */,
  "request_type" TEXT /* Type of the request (e.g., Board Up, Building Maintenance) */,
  "pli_division" INTEGER /* ID of the PLI division handling the request */,
  "y" REAL /* Latitude coordinate */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date and time the request was created */,
  "public_works_division" INTEGER /* ID of the public works division handling the request */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department handling the request */,
  "x" REAL /* Longitude coordinate */,
  "ward" INTEGER /* Ward where the request was made */,
  "x_id" INTEGER /* ID of the request in the X system */,
  "fire_zone" TEXT /* Fire zone where the request was made */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the request */,
  "resolution_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to resolve the request in hours */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the request */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the request */,
  "citizen_feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from the citizen after request resolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_requests_police_zone FOREIGN KEY ("police_zone") REFERENCES police_zones ("zone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_requests_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_requests_neighborhood FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_requests_geo_accuracy FOREIGN KEY ("geo_accuracy") REFERENCES geo_accuracy ("accuracy_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_requests_request_type FOREIGN KEY ("request_type") REFERENCES request_types ("type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_requests_department FOREIGN KEY ("department") REFERENCES departments ("department_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_requests_council_district FOREIGN KEY ("council_district") REFERENCES council_districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_requests_fire_zone FOREIGN KEY ("fire_zone") REFERENCES fire_zones ("zone_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_requests_public_works_division FOREIGN KEY ("public_works_division") REFERENCES public_works_divisions ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "police_zones" (
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each police zone */,
  "zone_name" TEXT /* Name of the police zone */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the police zone */,
  "zone_manager" TEXT /* Name of the manager responsible for the zone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "council_districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each council district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the council district */,
  "representative" TEXT /* Name of the council representative */,
  "office_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the council representative's office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the police zone where the neighborhood is located */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the council district where the neighborhood is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the neighborhood */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the neighborhood in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geo_accuracy" (
  "accuracy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accuracy type */,
  "accuracy_name" TEXT /* Name of the accuracy type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the accuracy type */,
  "accuracy_level" INTEGER /* Numerical level of accuracy (1 for low, 5 for high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accuracy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "request_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the request type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the request type */,
  "average_resolution_time" INTEGER /* Average time taken to resolve requests of this type in hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "public_works_divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each public works division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the public works division */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the division */,
  "head_of_division" TEXT /* Name of the head of the division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "department_head" TEXT /* Name of the department head */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fire_zones" (
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fire zone */,
  "zone_name" TEXT /* Name of the fire zone */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the fire zone */,
  "zone_coverage_area" REAL /* Area covered by the fire zone in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., city official, department head, field worker) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
